parameters.query: SET app.current_entity = 'all'; WITH today_epos AS (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(gross),0)::numeric(10,2) AS gross, COALESCE(SUM(covers),0) AS covers FROM epos_daily WHERE report_date = CURRENT_DATE), trail AS (SELECT AVG(daily.gross)::numeric(10,2) AS gross_avg, COUNT(*) AS samples, AVG(daily.covers)::numeric(8,2) AS covers_avg FROM (SELECT report_date, SUM(gross) AS gross, SUM(covers) AS covers FROM epos_daily WHERE report_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - 15 AND CURRENT_DATE - 1 AND extract(dow from report_date) = extract(dow from CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY report_date) daily), today_occ AS (SELECT occupancy_pct FROM accommodation_daily WHERE report_date = CURRENT_DATE LIMIT 1), trailing_occ AS (SELECT AVG(occupancy_pct)::numeric(5,2) AS occ_avg FROM accommodation_daily WHERE report_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - 15 AND CURRENT_DATE - 1 AND extract(dow from report_date) = extract(dow from CURRENT_DATE)), already_alerted AS (SELECT COUNT(*) AS today_alerts FROM audit_log WHERE pipeline = 'pub-anomaly-alerter-v1' AND result = 'anomaly' AND created_at::date = CURRENT_DATE) SELECT today_epos.gross AS today_gross, today_epos.covers AS today_covers, trail.gross_avg, trail.samples AS sample_n, trail.covers_avg, today_occ.occupancy_pct AS today_occ, trailing_occ.occ_avg AS occ_avg, already_alerted.today_alerts, extract(hour from NOW())::int AS hour_utc FROM today_epos, trail, trailing_occ, already_alerted LEFT JOIN today_occ ON true;

SET app.current_entity = 'all'; INSERT INTO audit_log (pipeline, action, ai_parsed, result, provider) VALUES ('pub-anomaly-alerter-v1', 'fired_alert', $pl${{ JSON.stringify({hour: $json.hour, issues: $json.issues}) }}$pl$::jsonb, 'anomaly', 'local') RETURNING id;

parameters.name: text
